title: armeria maritima subsp. bottendorfensis
intro: Armeria maritima subsp. bottendorfensis, also known as the sea thrift or armeria, is a subspecies of the armeria maritima plant, a perennial flowering plant native to Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Armeria maritima subsp. bottendorfensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
